raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX XXXX Charges were made to my American Express account as a result of a scam. I was being coerced to purchase XXXX XXXX XXXX using my Amex credit card. In addition, Amex XXXX cards were purchased online that I did not authorize. The total purchases that I am being held accountable for is {$6500.00}. No services or funds were received. 
On XX/XX/2024 a deposition was filed with XXXX XXXX XXXX Police XXXXXXXX XXXX and a formal complaint was filed with the Federal trade Commission. The American Express card was cancelled and a certified letter was sent to American Express outlining the the formal complaints that were initiated. 
I contacted the American Express fraud department and was told that i would not be responsible for the charges until further investigation. On XX/XX/2024 Amex sent an email stating that the total charge of {$6500.00} would go back on my account. I contacted the fraud department again. No reference or acknowledgement was made by the Amex fraud department to insure that the steps that I took to report fraudulent activity would be of any consequence. 
XXXX  XXXX XXXX kept me informed of the status of my account, that had a similar situation, by mail and email. AlXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX charges were resolved and there was no impact on my account.
